post.description:
Authenticate user via Auth service.

Proxies the login request to Auth service and returns
the access_token and csrf_token in the response body.

Logout user and invalidate session.

Requires Authorization Bearer header with session token.
Proxies logout to Auth service to invalidate the session.

Verify 2FA code after login.

Forwards request to Auth service /api/v1/auth/verify-2fa.

get.description:
Get current authenticated user.

Returns user information from Auth service.

schema.title: Response Get Me Auth Me Get

post.description:
Request password reset email.

Always returns success to prevent email enumeration.

schema.title: Response Forgot Password Auth Forgot Password Post

post.description: Reset password using token from email.

schema.title: Response Reset Password Auth Reset Password Post
Response Change Password Auth Change Password Post

post.description:
Register new organization with admin user.

Creates both the organization and the admin user in Auth service.

get.description:
List users in organization.

If organization_id is not provided, uses the current user's organization.

schema.title: Response Get User Usuarios  User Id  Get

put.description:
Update user.

Only organization owners can update users.

schema.title: Response Update User Usuarios  User Id  Put

delete.description:
Soft delete user.

Only organization owners can delete users.

schema.title: Response Delete User Usuarios  User Id  Delete

post.description:
Create invitation to join organization.

Only organization owners can invite users.

schema.title: Response Create Invitation Usuarios Convites Post

get.description:
List invitations for current organization.

Only organization owners can view invitations.

schema.title: Response List Invitations Usuarios Convites  Get

delete.description:
Revoke a pending invitation.

Only organization owners can revoke invitations.

schema.title: Response Revoke Invitation Usuarios Convites  Invitation Id  Delete

post.description:
Upload certificate to Cofre for encryption and storage.

Steps:
1. Verify user has access to empresa
2. Send certificate to Cofre for encryption
3. Store local reference with empresa_id

get.description:
List certificates.

If empresa_id is provided, lists certificates for that empresa.
Otherwise, lists all certificates the user has access to.

delete.description:
Delete certificate.

Deletes from both local database and Cofre.

schema.title: Response Delete Certificate Certificados  Certificado Id  Delete

post.description:
Sign data using certificate.

Steps:
1. Verify user has access to certificate via grupo
2. Check access rules (regras_acesso) - TODO
3. Send to Cofre for signing

schema.title: Response Listar Grupo Grupos Certificados Grupo  Grupo Id  Get
Response Listar Grupo Grupos Usuarios Grupo  Grupo Id  Get

post.description: Cria vínculos em lote entre um grupo e múltiplos usuários. Retorna os ids criados e os pulados com razão.

schema.title: Response Listar Grupo Regras Acesso Grupo  Grupo Id  Get
Response Listar Regras Acesso Hosts  Get
Response Listar Grupo Regras Acesso Hosts Grupo  Grupo Id  Get

get.description: Lista todos os ramos de atuação (para selects).

schema.title: Response Listar Todos Ramos Ramos  Get

post.description: Cria um novo ramo de atuação.

get.description: Lista ramos de atuação com paginação.
Busca um ramo de atuação por ID.

Health check endpoint.

Returns status of all connected services.

Readiness probe.

Returns 200 if the application is ready to handle requests.

Liveness probe.

Returns 200 if the application is running.

SignRequest.title: SignRequest
SignRequest.description: Request to sign data with certificate.

BearerAuth.description: Session token for authentication. Use the session_token from login response.
